title: Coleataenia stenodes
taxonomy: Coleataenia stenodes is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is classified under the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Paniceae. The genus Coleataenia is a group of plants closely related to the genus Paspalum. Coleataenia stenodes is native to the Americas, specifically in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Coleataenia stenodes is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Liliopsida.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the medicinal uses of Coleataenia stenodes.
constituents: Coleataenia stenodes is a plant species, but specific information regarding its active constituents is not readily available. However, some plants in the same family, Poaceae, have been studied for their bioactive compounds. These compounds can include flavonoids, alkaloids, and other phytochemicals with potential medicinal properties. More research is needed to determine the active constituents of Coleataenia stenodes. Further studies may provide valuable insights into the plant's potential uses and applications.
